query:
SELECT id, section, entity, status, trigger, current_stage, progress_pct, resume_page, total_pages, error_message, started_at, finished_at, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, started_at, COALESCE(finished_at, NOW())) as duration_min
FROM sync_logs
WHERE section = 'Boonphone'
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 15;
